Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/catchUnfailableEffect_effectFnRegular.ts(8,3): suggestion TS377009: The previous Effect does not fail, so this error-handling branch will never run. effect(catchUnfailableEffect)

==== /.src/catchUnfailableEffect_effectFnRegular.ts (2 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    // @effect-diagnostics catchToOrElseSucceed:off
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    
    // Effect.fn with regular (non-generator) function
    export const shouldReportEffectFnRegular = Effect.fn(
      () => Effect.succeed(42),
      Effect.catchAll(() => Effect.void)
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377009: The previous Effect does not fail, so this error-handling branch will never run. effect(catchUnfailableEffect)
    ) // <- should report here
    
    export const shouldNotReportEffectFnRegular = Effect.fn(
      () => Effect.fail("error"),
      Effect.catchAll(() => Effect.succeed(42))
    )
    
    export const shouldReportEffectFnRegularTraced = Effect.fn("traced")(
      () => Effect.succeed(42),
      Effect.catchAll(() => Effect.void)
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377009: The previous Effect does not fail, so this error-handling branch will never run. effect(catchUnfailableEffect)
    ) // <- should report here
